creator: papowell@astart.com
text:
Created attachment 144824
diffs to packages Makefile, pkg-plist files

The linux-oracle-instantclient-[basic,sqlplus] install a set of Linux libraries and the linux based SQLPlus client.  The 32 bit Linux libraries appear to be compatible with the emulators/linux_base-f10 port on FreeBSD 8.4 and 9.2.

The port has also been updated to use staging support.

The attached SHAR file contains diffs to the Makefiles and pkg-plist files in the packages.
